goal: Improve the HorrorCorridor starting scene through several independently scoped changes, then validate their combined integration branch.

tasks.title: Refine first-person camera feel
tasks.request: Improve movement-driven camera embodiment without changing network cadence, controls, or idle readability.

tasks.title: Upgrade the rusted service door kit
tasks.request: Improve the rusted service door mesh and material descriptors while preserving the shared wound-triangle contract.

tasks.title: Upgrade the broken generator kit
tasks.request: Improve the broken generator silhouette and descriptor fidelity without changing unrelated object kits.
